videos.headline: TreVeyon Henderson's TD runs the score up for Buckeyes
videos.description: TreVeyon Henderson runs right up the middle untouched for a Buckeyes touchdown to make the score 42-10.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (TreVeyon Henderson's TD runs the score up for Buckeyes) 2024/12/21

videos.headline: OSU on the board first with Will Howard to Jeremiah Smith TD
videos.description: Will Howard deposits a dime to Jeremiah Smith, who hauls in the nice catch for the Buckeyes touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (OSU on the board first with Will Howard to Jeremiah Smith TD) 2024/12/21

videos.headline: Nico Iamaleava's helmet cracked after hard tackle
videos.description: Tennessee QB Nico Iamaleava's helmet is left cracked after a hard tackle.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nico Iamaleava's helmet cracked after hard tackle) 2024/12/21

videos.headline: Quinshon Judkins scores to double Ohio State's lead over Tennessee
videos.description: Ohio State strikes again after Quinshon Judkin finds the end zone in the first quarter.

videos.headline: TreVeyon Henderson breaks free to put Ohio State up 21-0
videos.description: TreVeyon Henderson turns on the burners to find pay dirt, giving the Buckeyes a 21-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (TreVeyon Henderson breaks free to put Ohio State up 21-0) 2024/12/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Will Brooks somehow picks off Will Howard by a toe
videos.description: Will Brooks somehow comes out of nowhere for the incredible interception in the back of the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Will Brooks somehow picks off Will Howard by a toe) 2024/12/21

videos.headline: Nico Iamaleava channels his inner LeBron celebrating Vols TD
videos.description: Nico Iamaleava scores Tennessee's first touchdown of the game as the Volunteers cut into the deficit.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nico Iamaleava calls his own number for Tennessee TD) 2024/12/21

videos.headline: Jeremiah Smith hauls in his second TD of the night for Buckeyes
videos.description: Jeremiah Smith makes another great touchdown grab as Ohio State goes up by three possessions.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jeremiah Smith hauls in his second TD of the night for Buckeyes) 2024/12/21

videos.headline: Quinshon Judkins rushes in for Ohio State score
videos.description: Quinshon Judkins gives Ohio State a considerable lead over Tennessee with a short run into the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quinshon Judkins rushes in for Ohio State score) 2024/12/21
